_doc: Keyword list consumed by proposal-classify-reminder.py UserPromptSubmit hook. Hot-editable: hook re-reads on every prompt. Empty list / file missing = hook silently no-ops. Case-insensitive substring match against user prompt text. Per proposal P-0058 (classify gate enforcement, Phase 1) + P-0076 Phase 1 (structural-change triggers).
_source: P-0058 scope B.1 + risk row 'keyword false-positive' (user adjusts here); P-0076 Phase 1 added 12 structural-change keywords after 2026-05-26 dogfood (learn.md + INDEX.routing.json skipped classify because prompt 'A+B' hit zero existing keywords)
